The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT VIAS ENERGIES INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION's MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE

The application of Jared Stamell for admission to appear pro hac vice as counsel for Vias Energies Inc. is granted. No opposition filed, and the verified application satisfies the requirements of CRC 9.40. The Court will sign the proposed order provided with the moving papers.

Order is signed.

RULING - A R G U E D. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Vias Energies Inc.'s petition to compel arbitration is granted and the action is stayed pending arbitration of Plaintiff Alcantar & Kahn, LLP's claims. (See word minutes for complete details)

Orer is signed.
